whatHappened: Service layer imported directly from infrastructure layer (db from ../infrastructure/database)
whyItHappened: Didn't check architectural boundaries before writing import
prevention: Always call get_context first to understand layer constraints; services should use repository abstractions, not direct DB access

whatHappened: Added computeBlobId() function that duplicates SHA-256 hash logic already present in 80+ locations across the codebase, including canonical implementation at packages-oss/sdk/src/utils/hash.ts
whyItHappened: Focused on fixing the dedup bug quickly without checking for existing hash utilities. The DRY consolidation doc explicitly identifies hash utilities as a High Risk duplication pattern.
prevention: Before adding any crypto/hash function, search for existing implementations using: grep -r "createHash.*sha256" and check packages-oss/sdk/src/utils/hash.ts first. Reference the DRY consolidation doc for known duplication hotspots.
